seoTitle: West Fitzgerald vs West Holleton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Fitzgerald and West Holleton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Fitzgerald vs West Holleton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Fitzgerald and West Holleton.
heading: West Fitzgerald vs West Holleton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Fitzgerald, Western Australia and West Holleton, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Holleton has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to West Fitzgerald (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Fitzgerald or West Holleton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Fitzgerald has a flood risk score of 46/100, while West Holleton scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Fitzgerald scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. West Holleton scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Fitzgerald or West Holleton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Holleton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
